mnemonics: IPython & Jupyter: Interactive Python Joyfully Unleashes Terrific Exploratory Results
keyPoints: Jupyter Notebook provides an interactive coding environment for data analysis
IPython is the enhanced Python shell at the core of Jupyter
Magic commands (% prefix) extend functionality for common tasks
commonMistakes: Forgetting to save notebook changes regularly, risking work loss
Running cells out of order, causing variable dependency errors
Not using markdown cells to document the analysis process
